# GitHub Repository Settings Reference
# Apply these settings after creating the repository on GitHub.

## Repository Description (paste into GitHub Settings → General)
A modern PostgreSQL IDE with Monaco Editor, visual EXPLAIN analyzer, ER diagrams, schema diff, pgvector support, and more. Built with React + TypeScript + Node.js.

## Topics (add via GitHub Settings → Topics)
postgresql
postgres
database
ide
sql
sql-editor
query-editor
monaco-editor
react
typescript
nodejs
electron
pgvector
explain-analyze
er-diagram
schema-diff
database-management
developer-tools
dba-tools
open-source

## Website URL
(leave blank or set to your deployed URL)

## Social Preview Image
Recommended: Take a screenshot of the app with a query + results visible,
crop to 1280×640px, and upload as the social preview image.

## GitHub Pages
Not applicable — this is a full-stack app, not a static site.

## Releases
After pushing, create a v1.0.0 release with:
- Tag: v1.0.0
- Title: PgIDE v1.0.0 — Initial Release
- Description: Copy the Features section from README.md
